tables.table_title: Table 1. Classification accuracy comparison across models and datasets.
tables.table_note: The classification accuracy of the proposed cross-attention fusion model is summarized in Table 1. Our architecture consistently outperformed the baselines across all datasets, particularly for high-dimensional and semi-structured data.

tables.table_title: Table 2. Inference time comparison across models.
tables.table_note: The cross-attention fusion model demonstrated competitive inference times compared to classical-only baselines, as shown in Table 2.
